para.verbatim:
Start relay server.
Args: host: Host to bind to port_range: (min_port, max_port) for relay ports

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tuple[str, int] client_addr, Tuple[str, int] relay_addr, int lifetime=600, TransportProtocol transport=TransportProtocol.UDP)
memberdef.name: create_session

para.verbatim:
Create a new relay session.
Args: client_addr: Client (ip, port) relay_addr: Relay (ip, port) lifetime: Session lifetime in seconds transport: Transport protocol
Returns: RelaySession or None

Delete a relay session.
Args: session_id: Session ID
Returns: True if session was deleted
Add permission for peer to send data.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tuple[str, int] client_addr, bytes data, Tuple[str, int] peer_addr)
memberdef.name: handle_client_data

para.verbatim:
Handle data from client to relay to peer.
Args: client_addr: Client address data: Data to relay peer_addr: Destination peer address
Returns: True if data was relayed

Handle data from peer to relay to client.
Args: relay_addr: Relay address data: Data to relay
Returns: True if data was relayed

Clean up expired sessions.
Returns: Number of sessions removed
Handles UDP data relay between clients and peers.
